codeReview.summary: The SchemaGraph implementation and ReflectedModels integration broadly match the feature description, but the new test module does not fully verify the promised FK-coverage/order assertions. Because the tests only inspect `fk_map`, the feature does not completely satisfy its stated requirement to cover all 8 VAL-SCHEMA assertions against the reflected schema.

issues.description: `test_every_fk_col_has_entry` never compares `SchemaGraph.fk_map` to the reflected table constraints; it only validates entries that already exist in `fk_map`. A missing FK mapping would still pass this test, so VAL-SCHEMA-003 ("fk_map contains an FKInfo entry for each FK column") is not fully covered.

`test_no_table_before_its_dependencies` iterates `info.fk_map`, but `SchemaGraph.from_reflected()` only populates `fk_map` for single-column foreign-key constraints (`quantdb/generic_ingest.py:353-362`). Composite dependencies such as `values_quant -> obj_desc_inst/obj_desc_quant` and `values_cat -> obj_desc_inst/obj_desc_cat` are therefore never asserted, leaving VAL-SCHEMA-002 only partially verified.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `python-library-worker` skill's verification procedure is stale for this repo: it tells workers to run `pytest test/ -v --no-header -x` and import `SchemaGraph, Ingest, deep_upsert`, but AGENTS/services for this mission require ignoring `test/test_api.py`, and this feature only implemented `SchemaGraph`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/python-library-worker/SKILL.md:61-64` vs `.factory/services.yaml` `test` command and `AGENTS.md` testing guidance; the handoff's `skillFeedback.suggestedChanges` also calls out the import-check mismatch.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared environment docs are missing the most actionable local-DB workaround: they note that the full suite can hit AWS, but they do not record the AGENTS guidance that callers should pass an explicit localhost engine into `reflect_models()` because orthauth resolution can still point at AWS.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/library/environment.md` says the `test-db-*` config points to localhost while also noting AWS failures; `AGENTS.md` contains the concrete workaround pattern (`create_engine(...localhost...)` + `reflect_models(engine=engine)`), and the worker transcript shows time spent rediscovering it.

summary: Reviewed commit `5fff647`, the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and shared-state artifacts. The core implementation looks reasonable, but the added tests do not fully prove VAL-SCHEMA-002/003 against the reflected schema, so this review fails on incomplete validation coverage.
